debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := fun N hN => if N = x ⊔ y then {x, y} else {N}
newD : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M :=
  @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition.refinement C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M D B ⋯ ⋯ ⋯
contra : ¬IsMin D
⊢ False

failed_attempts:
simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx''
  exact contra hmax

simpa [h] using hx_mem
      simpa using this
    have hy_eq : y = x ⊔ y := by
      have : y ∈ ({x ⊔ y} : Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)) := by
        simpa [h] using hy_mem
      simpa using this
    have : x = ⊥ := by
      apply le_bot_iff.mp
      have h_disj : Disjoint x (x ⊔ y) := by simpa [hy_eq] using hxy
      exact disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp h_disj
    exact hx this
  exact contra hmax

have : x = x ⊔ y := by simpa using (Set.mem_singleton_iff.mp hx'')
    exact hx (sup_eq_left.mp this)
  exact contra hmax

simpa [Set.mem_singleton_iff] using hx''
  exact contra hmax
